economic_ownership_map.label: Legacy marketed products
economic_ownership_map.growth_driver: After-tax product cash flow net of erosion, rebates, sustaining commercial cost, and patent loss.

required_reinvestment.treatment: explicit in driver model or included in the stated owner-cash conversion and component range

economic_ownership_map.evidence: FY2025 product disclosures; product-level patent and erosion schedules pending.
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

economic_ownership_map.label: Growth marketed products
economic_ownership_map.growth_driver: Risked product cash flows with explicit penetration, duration, pricing, and commercial reinvestment.

required_reinvestment.treatment: explicit in driver model or included in the stated owner-cash conversion and component range

economic_ownership_map.evidence: FY2025 growth-product disclosures; launch curves and geographic economics pending.
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

economic_ownership_map.label: Research pipeline
economic_ownership_map.growth_driver: Each indication must have non-overlapping technical/regulatory probabilities, timing, remaining R&D, launch cost, and failure value.

required_reinvestment.treatment: explicit in driver model or included in the stated owner-cash conversion and component range

economic_ownership_map.evidence: Biogen pipeline and clinical-stage disclosures; indication-level probabilities and remaining spend pending.

probability_and_timing.timing_basis: Scenario range includes delay and failure outcomes.
probability_and_timing.probability_basis: Starter probability is an explicit analyst judgment pending base-rate and milestone reconciliation.
probability_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Remaining capital and financing are deducted in the stated option range.

economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

economic_ownership_map.label: Apellis marketed and pipeline assets
economic_ownership_map.growth_driver: Value acquired assets independently of purchase price, then deduct all acquisition financing and contingent consideration.

required_reinvestment.treatment: explicit in driver model or included in the stated owner-cash conversion and component range

economic_ownership_map.evidence: $5.6bn cash consideration plus CVRs; 2025 product sales of $689m and management growth expectations.

required_reinvestment.treatment: explicit in driver model or included in the stated owner-cash conversion and component range

economic_ownership_map.evidence: FY2025 cash/debt plus disclosed Apellis cash consideration and CVRs; closing balance sheet pending.
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.

method_route.label: Binary and milestone-driven assets
failure_modes: pipeline value counted in both revenue forecast and option schedule
method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only the terminal multiple.

top_value_drivers.label: Net debt, acquisition financing, and CVRs

blockers: product_cash_flows: Build product-level revenue, patent, rebate, margin, tax, and commercial reinvestment schedules.
pipeline_event_trees: Build indication-level, non-overlapping probability trees using clinical base rates, milestones, timing, remaining R&D, and launch capital.
closing_claims: Reconcile the acquisition closing balance sheet, borrowings, CVRs, integration costs, cash burn, and correlated downside.

falsifiers: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material economic claim is valued exactly once and every material evidence blocker is resolved.
cohort_purpose: Legacy products, growth products, pipeline probabilities, patent duration, cash, debt, and dilution.
